stories.title: Tiger Woods Withdraws from Masters, Enters Treatment — DUI Case Continues

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
BREAKING: Tiger Woods withdraws from the Masters.

He pleaded not guilty to DUI charges today and is stepping away from golf indefinitely to seek treatment.

Statement: "I am stepping away to seek treatment and focus on my health."

#GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods #Masters2026

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods DUI update — April 1, 2026:

- Not guilty plea entered
- Withdrawn from Masters + all golf indefinitely
- Treatment announced
- Arraignment: April 23

Augusta's Fred Ridley: "We fully support Tiger as he focuses on his well-being."

#GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods

article.headline: Tiger Woods Withdraws from 2026 Masters, Announces He Is Seeking Treatment

stories.title: Valero Texas Open Final Preview — Morikawa Out, Fleetwood/Åberg Lead Odds, Masters Spots at Stake

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Valero Texas Open starts Thursday.

Co-favorites: Fleetwood and Aberg (+1500 each)
Spieth +1600 — 2021 champion, best course history
Morikawa withdrew Tuesday

Winner gets the last Masters invitation.

Last stop before Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
5 players chasing their last Masters shot at Valero:

- Fowler (World No. 65)
- Horschel (No. 94)
- Finau (No. 107)
- Tom Kim (No. 126)
- Zalatoris (No. 299)

Winner earns an automatic Augusta invitation.

No pressure.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #PGATour

article.headline: Valero Texas Open 2026 Preview: Fleetwood and Åberg Lead Odds as Masters Spots Hang in the Balance

stories.title: Masters 2026 — 8 Days Out, Tiger Gone, Field Reshuffles

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 — 8 days away. Without Tiger.

Scheffler +480 chasing an unprecedented 3 straight.
McIlroy defending.
Schauffele, Morikawa, Koepka all chasing career Grand Slams.

The void Tiger leaves only makes the stakes higher.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Masters2026

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler has won the last 2 Masters.

No player has won 3 straight since... it has never been done.

8 days. Augusta National. Scheffler vs. the entire field — and history.

#GolfFanrecap #Scheffler #Masters2026

article.headline: Masters 2026 Preview: Scheffler Seeks History, Three Players Chase Grand Slams, Tiger Withdraws

stories.title: Jordan Spieth's Valero Mission — 2021 Champion Chasing Masters Form

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jordan Spieth won the Valero Texas Open in 2021.

He's back this week with +1600 odds and the best course history in the field.

He's not here to survive. He's here to build momentum before Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #Spieth #ValeroTexasOpen

article.headline: Jordan Spieth Returns to Valero — Where He Won in 2021 — With Augusta in Mind

stories.title: Masters Bubble Watch — Fowler, Horschel, Tom Kim, Zalatoris All In at Valero

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Rickie Fowler is world No. 65.

The Masters top-50 cutoff could decide his Augusta fate.

He is at Valero this week — and so is his last realistic shot at an invitation.

#GolfFanrecap #Fowler #Masters2026

stories.title: Grand Slam Chasers — Schauffele, Morikawa, Koepka at Augusta Without Tiger's Shadow

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Three players need only the Masters to complete a career Grand Slam:

- Schauffele (U.S. Open + The Open)
- Morikawa (PGA + The Open)
- Koepka (4 majors, needs Masters)

Last completed: McIlroy in 2025. Before that: Gary Player in 1965.

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Hyo Joo Kim and the Chevron Championship — LPGA's First Major Is 3 Weeks Away

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Hyo Joo Kim has won back-to-back LPGA events — including shooting two 61s at the Ford Championship.

The Chevron Championship (first women's major of 2026) is 3 weeks away.

She enters as the hottest player in women's golf.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #ChevronChampionship
